subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who sendeth down verses as He willeth and maketh mention of His servant who believed in the divine decree when the horizon was adorned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات کیف شاء و یذکر عبده الذی آمن بالقدر اذ تزین المنظر
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital
